name: text-to-gds
description: Local-first MCP tools for superconducting GDS generation, DRC, extraction, LJPA planning, stack preview, and simulation loops.

interface.shortDescription: Generate, inspect, and simulate superconducting GDS layouts.
interface.longDescription: Text-to-GDS packages local MCP tools and agent workflows for compiling gdsfactory PCells into GDSII, emitting semantic sidecars, running KLayout-backed checks, extracting layout parameters, planning LJPA designs, exporting 2.5D stack previews, and preparing ideal or adapter-backed superconducting circuit simulations.
defaultPrompt: Create a Manhattan JJ GDS and run DRC.
Design a 5 GHz LJPA with wide bandwidth.
Compile a CPW PCell, extract layout parameters, and export a 2.5D stack preview.
Estimate JJ current from a layout sidecar and prepare a JoSIM deck.
